title: "Christmas 06" Commemorative Stamp Issue Order, 2006, SRO 29 of 2006
text:
2006 STAMP S.R.O. 29
COMMONWEALTH OF DOMINICA
STATUTORY RULES AND ORDERS NO.29 OF 2006
ORDER
MADE by the Minister under sections 3 and 4 of the Stamp Act,
(Chapter 68:01).
(Gazetted 7th September, 2006)
1. This Order may be cited as the- Short title.
“CHRISTMAS 2006 ” COMMEMORATIVE STAMP
ISSUE ORDER, 2006
2. In this Order, the term “stamp” means an adhesive stamp
Interpretation.
for postage and revenue.
3. During the period from 1st December, 2006 to Stamps.
28th February, 2007 both days inclusive, there shall be issued
throughout the State, special Commonwealth of Dominica post-
age stamps (“CHRISTMAS 2006” COMMEMORATIVE
STAMP ISSUE) of values and colours specified in Schedule I Schedule I.
and the designs specified in Schedule II hereto. Schedule II.
4. The dies and other implements required to give effect to Dies.
this Order shall be destroyed together with all residue whatso-
ever of all stamps authorized hereby, as soon as possible after the
28th day of February, 2007.
5. This Order shall come into effect on the 1st day of
Commencement.
December, 2006.

2006 STAMP S.R.O. 29
SCHEDULE I
Adhesive stamps will be as follows:
sheetlet of 4 stamps @ $2.00 - Yellow, Green, Red,
each depicts Blue, Purple, White
SCHEDULE II
Sheetlet of 4 stamps @ $3.00 - Merry Christmas
each depicts Happy Holidays
Made this 6th day of September, 2006
AMBROSE GEORGE
Minister for Public Works
and Public Utilities
DOMINICA
Printed by the Government of Printer at the Government Printery, Roseau
(Price 40 cents)
